text.title: Azure Application Gateway v2 + WAF Worked Example
text.summary: One worked end-to-end example showing inputs, the filled spec artefact, and the validator pass.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Architect runs `Azure Application Gateway v2 + WAF` for a new checkout service before launch. NFR scope: 99.95% availability, p95 checkout < 300ms, PCI scope minimised.

list.item: Named owner with role + escalation path.
Trigger event log (cron run or threshold breach).

section.title: Filled artefact (excerpt)
Validator trace
section.p: Running `python3 scripts/validate-azure-app-gateway-waf.py --file out.json` exits 0; running with the bad example exits 1 and prints VIOLATION lines per missing required field.
